summary: Tested new user profile features: Address management (CRUD), GDPR-compliant account deletion, post-order address update, and checkout saved address integration. All 17 backend API tests passed. All UI components working correctly.

details: GET /api/user/addresses - Returns list of saved addresses
POST /api/user/addresses - Creates new address with nickname
PUT /api/user/addresses/{id} - Updates existing address
DELETE /api/user/addresses/{id} - Deletes address
PUT /api/user/addresses/{id}/set-default - Sets address as default
Duplicate nickname validation works (returns 400)
Invalid pincode validation works (returns 422)
Authentication required for all endpoints (returns 401)
POST /api/user/delete-account - GDPR-compliant deletion
Rejects wrong confirmation text ('DELETE MY ACCOUNT' required)
Rejects wrong password
Requires authentication (returns 401)
PUT /api/orders/{order_number}/update-address endpoint exists
Returns 404 for nonexistent orders
Requires authentication (returns 401)
Validates required fields
GET /api/user/profile-stats returns order_count, address_count, wishlist_count
Requires authentication
data-testid='saved-addresses-link' card present
data-testid='delete-account-btn' button in Danger Zone present
Notification Preferences, Change Password cards present
Order History shows orders with Delivered status
'Manage Addresses' modal opens from account page
Shows existing 'Home' address with Default badge
Edit and Delete buttons present on address cards
data-testid='add-new-address-btn' button present
Nickname suggestions (Home, Office, Parents, Other) available in form
Step 1: Shows warning with 5 bullet points about what gets deleted
Step 1: Shows GDPR Compliance notice about anonymization
Step 2: Password verification field present
Step 2: Reason for leaving (optional) textarea present
Step 2: Confirmation text field with 'DELETE MY ACCOUNT' requirement
Step 2: data-testid='delete-account-final-btn' present
data-testid='use-saved-address-btn' button in Billing Address section
'Last Order' button also available for quick fill
Clicking opens 'Select Address' modal in select mode
Modal shows address cards with 'Use' button
Selecting address fills the billing form

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ user_profile.py router properly registered in server.py at line 82
✓ All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
✓ Address deletion handles default reassignment correctly
✓ Account deletion properly anonymizes orders (GDPR compliance)
✓ Post-order address update logs changes to admin_events collection
✓ AddressManager.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
✓ DeleteAccountModal.jsx has proper 2-step flow with validation
✓ BillingAddressForm.jsx properly integrates AddressManager in select mode
seed_data_creation: Test addresses created during pytest were cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully working: Address management (CRUD), GDPR account deletion, post-order address update with retailer notification, checkout saved address integration. Test user has one 'Home' address saved as default. Order #ADD-ZOHO-TEST-001 exists in delivered status.
